title: Electric Arabian Shrimp Um Ali
description: A spicy, shattering, cozy Middle Eastern pasta dish that blends succulent shrimp with aromatic spices, al dente pasta, and fresh chives for a pescatarian-friendly twist on Um Ali.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil, cook the fettuccine until al dente, about 7 to 8 minutes, then drain and set aside.
In a skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the shrimp until just pink, 2 to 3 minutes per side, then remove and set aside.
Add the vegetable broth, ground cumin, smoked paprika, sumac, and harissa paste to the same skillet and simmer for 2 minutes.
Return the cooked pasta to the skillet, tossing to coat it in the spice broth, and cook for another 2 minutes to infuse flavors.
Stir in the sautéed shrimp, lemon juice, salt and pepper, and let the mixture heat through for 1 minute.
Remove from heat and fold in the chopped chives and toasted pine nuts for added crunch.
Serve hot, garnishing with extra chives and a squeeze of lemon if desired.
Enjoy your electric Arabian shrimp umm-ali.
